_meta.description: Canonical NBA player list. Generated from jsierrahoopshype/nba-headshots active.json (the project's scraped + verified NBA.com active-roster manifest). The slug, full_name, team_id, and team_abbrev fields come from there. team is mapped from team_abbrev to our slug via teams.json. aliases preserve any curated short-form nicknames (Wemby, SGA, KD, JB, ...) from the previous canonical; bare last names are NOT included because they collide too often in a 500+ player pool — the tagger's _build_candidate_index also stops adding implicit last-name candidates as part of this PR.
